comments.comment: Highvale mine was officially closed on 31st December, 2021. The mine is now in active reclamation phase. There was no coal mined or removed in 2022.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: No ethylene glycol was transferred offsite for disposal in 2020. With normal variations in mining operations, this variation in the amount of glycol disposed is expected.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Lead emissions from batteries transferred offsite for recycling are dependent on the no. of batteries used which varies annually. Fewer batteries were used in 2020 than in 2019, leading to a drop in emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: With Sundance and Keephills facilities using less coal with the uptake in natural gas, less coal was mined at Highvale in 2020. This led to a decrease in particulate emissions from road dust as less loads of coal were moved. Storage and handling emissions increased due to more ash being stored at the mine landfill, but with those emissions being negligible compared to the larger road dust emissions, the overall emissions decreased.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Recyclable batteries were sent for recycling to Interstate, Edmonton. This reduces environmental impacts and the cost of offsite disposals.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The ash transferred off-site had a significant reduction due to the ashes being used for the mine reclamation and landfill. This led to a significant reduction in PM releases from Storage/Handling.
Also, the mine ramping down resulted in fewer mine vehicles resulting in fewer PM releases from unpaved roads.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 17% reduction in off-road traffic year over year, thus Particulate Matter from road dust was reduced.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 17% reduction in off-road traffic year over year, thus Particulate Matter from road dust was reduced.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Particulate matter emissions at the mine result from road dust mainly. With the mine in reclamation mode from 2022 onwards, the amount of vehicle kilometers driven by the mine fleet reduced dramatically compared to 2021 when coal was still being mined. The reduction in amount of vehicles and also distance travelled annually led to a huge reduction in PM emissions. 
An additional source of PM emissions used to be coal and ash piles at the mine. With no coal and ash being produced at the mine or adjacent generating facilities (Sundance and Keephills were converted to gas in 2021 as well), these emissions also reduced dramatically.
